text: Grooming recommendation: reject. The commands serve different purposes (current state vs timeline), have different output shapes, and the proposed flags (-a, -c) conflict with existing conventions. show --history already covers the overlap. See conversation for full analysis.

Implementation plan: fold history into show. show T-1 = fields + 3 recent notes (default). show -a/--all = lift limit, show all notes. show -n/--notes = sugar for --kind note -a. show --history = all event types, no limit. show -l N/--limit N = cap entries. show --kind KIND = filter by event kind. history command becomes alias for show --history. h alias keeps working.

Simplification round 2: show has only 3 flags now. -n = all notes. -a = everything (notes + full event history). -l N = cap entries. Dropped --history (replaced by -a), --kind, --field as unnecessary complexity.
